sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106443" key="u(droro/dinon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδρο-ρόδῐνον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n106443.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">oil of roses mixed with water,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:13:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.13.21</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.24</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
